zh.lifeSummary: 當Elisabeth de Morialmé於大約1190年出生時，她的父親Arnoul de Morialmes34歲，母親Jeanne de Bailleuil27歲。她於大約1210年與Nicolas de Condé結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和5個女兒的父母。她去世於1264年11月12日在法國諾爾-帕-德-卡拉斯帕-德-卡拉斯貝圖內享年75歲，埋葬在法國諾爾-帕-德-卡拉斯諾爾德孔代-素-利斯考特。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Elisabeth de Morialmé于大约1190年出生时，她的父亲Arnoul de Morialmes34岁，母亲Jeanne de Bailleuil27岁。她于大约1210年与Nicolas de Condé结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和5个女儿的父母。她去世于1264年11月12日在法国諾爾-帕-德-卡拉斯帕-德-卡拉斯貝圖內享年75岁，埋葬在法国諾爾-帕-德-卡拉斯諾爾德孔代-素-利斯考特。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Elisabeth
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The spelling of Elizabeth used in the Authorized Version of the New Testament, and in most modern European languages. This was the name of the mother of John the Baptist (Luke 1:60). Etymologically, the name means ‘God is my oath’, and is therefore identical with Elisheba, the name of the wife of Aaron according to the genealogy at Exodus 6:23. The final element seems to have been altered by association with Hebrew shabbāth ‘Sabbath’.

variants.name: Elizabeth
meanings: The usual spelling of   Elisabeth   in English. It is recorded in the medieval period, but was made popular by being borne by  Queen Elizabeth I  of England (  1533–1603 ). In the 20th century it again became extremely fashionable, partly because it was the name of  Elizabeth Bowes-Lyon  (  1900–2002 ), who in  1936  became Queen Elizabeth as the wife of King George VI, and after his death in  1952  achieved great public affection as Queen Mother for nearly half a century. Even more influentially, it is the name of her daughter  Queen Elizabeth II  (  b. 1926 ).

historicEvents.title: Magna Carta
historicEvents.description: King John of England agreed to a charter of rights called the Magna Carta. The document was originally drafted by the Archbishop of Canterbury to establish peace between King John and a group of rebel barons. The Magna Carta was completed in 1215 and is now considered to be one of the greatest constitutional documents of all time.

historicEvents.title: France Declares War on England
historicEvents.description: France declared war on England as Louis VIII of France attacked Poitou and northern Gascony.

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

en.lifeSummary: When Elisabeth de Morialmé was born about 1190, her father, Arnoul de Morialmes, was 34 and her mother, Jeanne de Bailleuil, was 27. She married Nicolas de Condé about 1210. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 5 daughters. She died on 12 November 1264, in Béthune, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, France, at the age of 75, and was buried in Condé-sur-l'Escaut, Nord, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, France.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Elisabeth de Morialmé est née environ 1190, son père, Arnoul de Morialmes, avait 34 ans et sa mère, Jeanne de Bailleuil, avait 27 ans. Elle a épousé Nicolas de Condé environ 1210. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 5 filles. Elle est décédée le 12 novembre 1264, à Béthune, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, France, à l’âge de 75 ans, et a été enterrée à Condé-sur-l'Escaut, Nord, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, France.

de.lifeSummary: Als Elisabeth de Morialmé um 1190 geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Arnoul de Morialmes 34 und ihre Mutter Jeanne de Bailleuil 27. Sie hat um 1210 Nicolas de Condé geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 5 Töchter. Sie starb am 12. November 1264 im Alter von 75 Jahren in Béthune, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, Frankreich und wurde in Condé-sur-l'Escaut, Nord, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, Frankreich begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Elisabeth de Morialmé è nata il circa 1190, sua padre, Arnoul de Morialmes, aveva 34 anni e sua madre, Jeanne de Bailleuil, aveva 27 anni. Lei sposato Nicolas de Condé circa 1210. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 5 figlie. Morì il 12 novembre 1264, nel Béthune, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, Francia, all'età di 75 anni, e fu sepolta a Condé-sur-l'Escaut, Nord, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, Francia.

ja.lifeSummary: Elisabeth de Morialméが約1190年に生まれた時，父Arnoul de Morialmesは34歳，母Jeanne de Bailleuilは27歳であった。約1210年にNicolas de Condéと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と5人の娘の親であった。彼女は1264年11月12日にフランスノード-プアス-デ-カレイスプアス-デ-カレイスブeスウンで75歳で死去し，フランスノード-プアス-デ-カレイスノードコンドe-スル-ル'エスカウトにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Elisabeth de Morialmé(이)가 대략 1190년에 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Arnoul de Morialmes(은)는 34세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Jeanne de Bailleuil(은)는 27세였다. 그녀는 대략 1210년 Nicolas de Condé(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1264년 11월 12일 프랑스 노르드-파스-데-캘레이 파스-데-캘레이 브e툰에서 75세의 나이로 사망했으며 프랑스 노르드-파스-데-캘레이 노르드 콘드e-수-'스카트에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Elisabeth de Morialmé nasceu aproximadamente 1190, seu pai, Arnoul de Morialmes, tinha 34 anos e sua mãe, Jeanne de Bailleuil, tinha 27 anos. Ela casou-se com Nicolas de Condé aproximadamente 1210. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 5 filhas. Ela faleceu em 12 de novembro de 1264, em Béthune, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, França, com 75 anos, e foi sepultada em Condé-sur-l'Escaut, Nord, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, França.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Elisabeth de Morialmé родилась около 1190 г., её отцу по имени Arnoul de Morialmes было 34 года, а матери, которую звали Jeanne de Bailleuil, 27. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Nicolas de Condé около 1210 г. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 5 дочерей. Она умерла 12 ноября 1264 г. в местности бeтун, пас-де-калеи, норд-пас-де-калеи, Франция в возрасте 75 лет и была похоронена в местности кондe-сур-л'ескаут, норд, норд-пас-де-калеи, Франция.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Elisabeth de Morialmé nació aproximadamente 1190, su papá, Arnoul de Morialmes, tenía 34 años y su mamá, Jeanne de Bailleuil, tenía 27 años. Se casó con Nicolas de Condé aproximadamente 1210. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 5 hijas. Murió el 12 de noviembre de 1264, en Béthune, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, Francia, a la edad de 75 años, y fue sepultada en Condé-sur-l'Escaut, Nord, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, Francia.
